productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Pack of 2 Navy Blue Socks
description: Pack of two socks in navy blueIt's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these pairs of socks from United Colors of  Benetton.  A glimpse of these socks from beneath a rolled up pair of jeans adds a hint of eccentricity to your classic style.Made of 73% cotton, 25% nylon and 2% elastaneNavy blue socks with the brand name on either sides of the midfoot and brand logo at the mouthSock careMachine wash cold in not more than 30 degreesDo not dry cleanUse non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron
